mechanism: Central clearing mandate mechanically increases margin requirements from 1-2% to 3-5%, forcing leverage compression from 50-100x to 20-33x across the $800B-$1.5T basis trade, potentially triggering $200-500B in Treasury selling. Timing compounds with Q2 quarter-end repo stress.
regime_dependence: Conditional on SEC mandate implementation in Q2 2026 as scheduled; cross-margining offsets could dampen impact by 50%+; Treasury/Fed transitional facilities could mitigate.
